Sampler Settings

Advanced / Experimental
Keyboard Shortcuts
Audio Settings
TTS Settings

Sampler Settings

Core Settings
🔥 Temperature
Controls creativity. Higher = more random.
Good for: Storytelling, brainstorming, character dialogue.
Example: Higher temp → "The dragon laughs and offers tea."
Warning: None.
Enabled
🎯 Top‑P Conflicts with Min‑P, Typical‑P, Top‑A
Filters tokens by cumulative probability.
Good for: Focused output.
Example: 0.9 → 90% probability mass.
Warning: Conflicts with Min‑P, Typical‑P, Top‑A.
🔢 Top‑K
Only allows the top K most likely tokens.
Good for: More deterministic output.
Example: K=40 → stable but flexible.
Warning: None.
🧠 Repeat Penalty
Penalizes repeated tokens.
Good for: Preventing loops.
Example: Stops "Hello hello hello…"
Warning: Too high makes writing weird.
🔁 Repeat Last‑N
How far back repetition is checked.
Good for: Long‑form writing.
Example: 64 → good for chat.
Warning: Very high values slow generation.
Intermediate Controls
Enabled
⚖️ Presence Penalty Conflicts with Frequency Penalty
Penalizes new topics (reduces topic drift).
Good for: Staying on topic.
Example: 0.3 → stay focused.
Warning: Conflicts with Frequency Penalty.
Enabled
📊 Frequency Penalty Conflicts with Presence Penalty
Penalizes tokens based on frequency.
Good for: Avoiding repeated words.
Example: Stops "very very very."
Warning: Conflicts with Presence Penalty.
🚫 No‑Repeat N‑Gram Size
Prevents repeating any N‑gram.
Good for: Killing loops dead.
Example: N=3 → no repeated 3‑word phrases.
Warning: Can break poetry or dialogue.
Enabled
🎲 Typical‑P Conflicts with Top‑P
Filters tokens by typical probability.
Good for: Natural‑sounding text.
Example: 1.0 = no filtering.
Warning: Conflicts with Top‑P.
Advanced Controls
Enabled
⚙️ Mirostat Mode Overrides Temperature, Top‑P, Typical‑P
Auto‑tunes sampling parameters.
Good for: Consistent perplexity.
Example: Mode 2 for stable long‑form.
Warning: Overrides Temperature, Top‑P, Typical‑P.
🌡️ Temperature
Controls randomness in responses.
Good for: Adjusting creativity.
Example: 0.7 = balanced.
Warning: Overridden by Mirostat.
Enabled
🌡️ Dynamic Temperature Range Can conflict with Mirostat
Adjusts temperature based on token probability.
Good for: Adaptive creativity.
Example: More varied on low‑prob tokens.
Warning: Can conflict with Mirostat.
✂️ Eta Cutoff
Removes tokens based on relative probability.
Good for: Outlier control.
Example: Smooths output.
Warning: None.
� Encoder Repetition Penalty
Penalizes repetition in the prompt.
Good for: Preventing echoing.
Example: Stops "You said: You said:"
Warning: Too high breaks instruction following.
🧱 Seed
Controls randomness.
Good for: Reproducible outputs.
Example: Same seed = same story.
Warning: -1 = random.

Model Settings

Core Model Settings
🧠 Model Family
Auto-detected from GGUF metadata
Purpose: Determines default template, tokenizer, context behavior
🧩 Model Variant
Auto-detected from GGUF metadata
Purpose: Helps set safe defaults for KV cache, threads, batch size
⚙️ Thread Count
CPU parallelism
Default: num_cores - 1
Example: 12-core CPU → 11 threads
🚀 Batch Size
Tokens processed per step
Default: Auto (based on RAM/VRAM)
Note: Higher = faster but more RAM
🧮 GPU Offload Layers
Moves layers to GPU for speed
Default: Auto (gollama decides)
Performance Settings
⚡ KV Cache Size
Tokens stored before eviction
Default: Auto (model default)
Range: 512 → model_max_context
🧊 KV Cache Type
How KV cache is stored/managed
Default: Standard
🧱 Rope Scaling Mode
Extends usable context window
Auto: Detected from metadata
LLaMA 3: Dynamic
LFM: Linear
📏 Rope Factor
How aggressively to scale positional embeddings
Default: Auto
Range: 1.0 → 8.0
🧮 Tensor Split
Multi-GPU partitioning
Default: Auto
Range: 0 → 100%
Memory & Context Settings
🧠 Max Context Window
Auto-detected from GGUF metadata
Slider: 1k → 256k
Usable: max_context - safety_margin
🔁 Context Rollover Mode
How context is trimmed
Default: Memory-Guided (HOWL default)
🧩 Memory Integration
Enables memory system to guide post-rollover
Default: On
Enabled
🧠 System Prompt Cache
Keeps system prompt pinned in KV cache
Default: On
Enabled
Prompt & Template Settings
🧾 Prompt Template
Auto-detected from GGUF metadata
Examples: chat_template, mistral.chat_template
🧩 Custom Jinja Template
Full manual override
🧱 System Prompt Override
Replaces the model's default system prompt
🧬 User Prompt Prefix
Adds a prefix to every user message
🧬 Assistant Prompt Prefix
Adds a prefix to every assistant message
🧩 Stop Sequences
Controls where generation halts
Default: Auto
Format: Comma-separated list
🧮 Tokenizer Override
For models with mismatched tokenizers
Auto: Detected from metadata

Online

Dungeon Master
